title: “UFO Secrets Are Held By A Global Cabal” (Ft. Steven Greer)
summary: Dr. Steven Greer discusses his decades-long involvement in UFO disclosure, claiming that a transnational criminal organization controls advanced technologies including gravity control and free energy systems. He asserts that most UFO sightings are now man-made craft, that alien abductions are actually covert human operations, and that key figures in modern UFO disclosure are spreading partial truths mixed with disinformation.

acronyms.definition: Intelligence that is not of human origin
Modern term for UFOs, which Greer considers a CIA-originated term for mind manipulation
World War II intelligence agency that preceded the CIA
US intelligence agency responsible for satellites and reconnaissance
Alleged secret committee overseeing UFO-related programs
Federal law used to prosecute organized crime conspiracies
Man-made craft reverse-engineered from extraterrestrial technology

acronyms.expansion: Close Encounter of the Fifth Kind
acronyms.definition: Human-initiated contact with extraterrestrial beings using consciousness protocols
Pentagon office established to investigate UAP phenomena

events.description: Eisenhower's farewell address warning about the military-industrial complex

key_claims.claim: The US mastered gravity control in October 1954
Most UFOs seen today are man-made craft, not extraterrestrial
All alien abduction cases investigated by John Mack and Bud Hopkins were actually perpetrated by humans, not extraterrestrials
JFK was killed over UFO-related issues and programs attached to the CIA science and technology branch
9/11 was created as a diversion to prevent UFO disclosure from happening
Nazi Germany had early prototype electrogravidic disc craft that were brought to the US after WWII
There are top secret files on UFOs dating back to the late 1800s and early 1900s
A Fortune 50 company chairman was threatened with assassination when he approached Greer about free energy disclosure
General Stubblebine offered Greer $2 billion in 1992 to join the UFO secrecy cabal
Luis Elizondo, Chris Mellon, and David Grusch are spreading partial truths mixed with disinformation about UFOs being threats
The transnational organization controlling UFO secrets has technologies that can penetrate time-space beyond conventional encryption
Greer has 760 whistleblowers he has debriefed, including direct firsthand witnesses
Man-made UFOs can travel at 200,000 mph while occupants experience only 1G due to electromagnetic field space-time bubble
The mid-1950s saw development of headset technology allowing remote viewing of distant places
Free energy technology has existed for decades and could end poverty and pollution worldwide
